detect.prompt: Run hang detection scan now. Scan all VO agent lock files under Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/state/agents/*/lock for jobs running longer than 60 minutes. For each hung job: walk the process tree, capture py-spy stack traces for Python processes, classify the hang, decide whether to kill, log the incident, and file GitHub issues for new patterns. Output a scan summary at the end.
detect.description: Scans for hung VO agent jobs, diagnoses via process tree and py-spy, kills if safe, logs incidents

daily-report.prompt: Generate the daily 5W incident report. Collect all hang incidents from Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/hang-scout/incidents/ in the last 24 hours. Generate a self-contained dark-themed HTML report using the 5W framework (Who/What/When/Where/Why) for each incident. Include executive summary, pattern summary table, and recommendations. Save to output/hang-scout/daily-report-YYYYMMDD.html and daily-report-latest.html. Open in Edge.
daily-report.description: Generates daily 5W incident report summarizing all hang detections in the last 24 hours
